scope.summary: P-U3 makes dashboard-facing 403 responses structured ErrorEnvelope JSON while keeping all dashboard auth 403s uniform and non-oracular.
out_of_scope: OAuth bearer and non-dashboard HTTP guard response shapes are not changed.
Dashboard 401 responses retain their existing auth-required JSON shape; this bead closes the dashboard 403 envelope defect.

entry_points.name: dashboard 403 response shaping
entry_points.trace: crates/oraclemcp-core/src/http/mod.rs now routes dashboard-facing guard/auth 403s through one ErrorEnvelope response: error_class=POLICY_DENIED, message=`dashboard request was refused`, and a generic next_steps entry. It deliberately omits cause-specific `error` labels.

entry_points.name: dashboard no-auth-oracle unit pin
entry_points.trace: `timeout 480 env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --lib malicious_page_cannot_trigger_dashboard_gated_action -- --nocapture` exited 0: 1 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored. The test proves cross-origin and literal Origin:null dashboard POST refusals both return the same POLICY_DENIED envelope, do not reach dispatch, and do not contain dashboard_same_origin_required, Origin/Host header details, csrf, or action_ticket labels.

entry_points.name: R3 live browser assertion
entry_points.trace: `timeout 900 env NODE_PATH=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/web/node_modules bash scripts/rig/rig_browser_lane.sh run --log` exited 0. The Playwright R3 test asserted an unauthorized dashboard POST returns 403 application/json with isError=true, error_class=POLICY_DENIED, generic message, next_steps, and no cause-specific error field or leaked refusal substrings.

entry_points.name: R3 browser artifact
entry_points.trace: `target/e2e/browser-lane/run-1784715371087-ad678b13-a6cb-4368-87f8-1e7f70c50c96/browser-lane-result.json` records dashboard_403.status=403, dashboard_403.error_class=POLICY_DENIED, and dashboard_403.next_steps=1 alongside the positive pair/action/SSE evidence; sha256=89bac33611a2237bbc13b0123ca7f415a972b62415bb5b5e91edb4e3108fa350.

entry_points.name: TypeScript, formatting, and script syntax
entry_points.trace: `npm --prefix web exec -- tsc -p web/tsconfig.json --noEmit`, `cargo fmt --package oraclemcp-core --package oraclemcp --check`, `bash -n scripts/rig/rig_browser_lane.sh`, `bash -n scripts/e2e/run_all.sh`, and `git diff --check -- <touched paths>` all exited 0.

limitations: The live artifact is local under target/ and is not committed; the committed evidence records the exact artifact path, summarized fields, and SHA-256 digest in the trace.
No full workspace cargo gate is claimed from this shared checkout.
